title: Citrusy Post-Workout Kenyan Nutella Nigiri
description: A refreshing post-workout snack combining Kenyan flair with Italian chocolate-hazelnut goodness. This nigiri-style treat is shaped like sushi but packs a keto-friendly punch.

ingredients.name: Granulated sweetener
ingredients.notes: e.g. Swerve, Erythritol, or Monk Fruit Sweetener

instructions: Combine almond flour, coconut flour, and salt in a large bowl.
Add Nutella, egg, granulated sweetener, and lime juice to the dry ingredients. Mix until a dough forms.
Divide the dough into 6-8 equal pieces and shape each into a ball.
Use a small amount of peanut oil to prevent sticking and shape each ball into a triangle, like nigiri sushi.
Place the triangles on a parchment-lined baking sheet and drizzle with a small amount of peanut oil.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown and the centers are set.
Remove from the oven and allow to cool completely on a wire rack.
If desired, sprinkle with chopped fresh chilies for added flavor and heat.
